data.author: sachitv
data.message:
Add more tests for Parallel behaviours (#244)

- Adds more tests for Parallel Failure. (This was not tested before)
- Adds more tests for Parallel without synchronisation. (This was also not tested before)

data.author: jfeil
data.message:
[visitors] added a finalise method (#191)

This will get called immediately post tick (c.f. initialise immediately
pre tick) but before any of the post tick handlers.

data.author: sachit-wp
data.message:
Isolate test and doc dependencies from installed dependencies (#72)

Makes use of the `extra_requires` variable in `setup.py`. It also updates the virtualenv bash scripts to make use of `setup.py` for installing dependencies instead of the ugly duckling - rtd-requirements.txt which we want to go away if at some point read-the-docs gives us a way to use the one source of truth for dependencies - setup.py.
